site.title: I-International Accessibility Task Force (Inhloso Yokufinyeleleka Emhlabeni Wonke)
site.tagline: Ukusuka kwesidingo sokufinyeleleka kuya ku-repo yomphakathi
nav.label: Okuyisisekelo
meta.home.description: I-IATF iguqula izidingo zangempela zokufinyeleleka zibe izinqolobane zomthombo ovulekile zomphakathi.
meta.projects.description: Hlola amaphrojekthi okufinyeleleka komphakathi ashicilelwe nge-IATF.
meta.propose.description: Cela iphrojekthi yokufinyeleleka ku-IATF ngewebhu, nge-imeyili, noma nge-Discord.
meta.governance.description: Funda ukuthi i-IATF yamukela kanjani amaphrojekthi, iphatha izinqolobane, futhi igcina imisebenzi isesidlangalaleni.
meta.join.description: Izindlela zokubamba iqhaza ku-IATF: ukufaka ikhodi, ukuhumusha, ukuhlola, noma ukugcina iphrojekthi.
meta.accessibility.description: Indlela i-IATF ehlose ngayo ukugcina le webhusayithi ifinyeleleka nokuthi ungabika kanjani ngesithiyo sokufinyeleleka.
meta.transparency.description: Imibhalo yomphakathi ye-IATF: izinqumo, amaphrojekthi, nezibuyekezo zigcinwa zivulekile ngokuzenzakalelayo.
registry.empty.title: Azikho amaphrojekthi ashicilelwe okwamanje
registry.empty.body: I-IATF ilungiselela iqoqo layo lokuqala lamaphrojekthi omphakathi.
proposal.form.title: Thumela isicelo
proposal.form.body: Gcwalisa ifomu elingezansi ukuze uthumele isicelo ku-IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: I-JavaScript iyadingeka ukuze usebenzise leli fomu lewebhu. Uma lingatholakali, sebenzisa i-imeyili noma i-Discord esikhundleni salokho.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Ukuthumela bukhoma akuhlelwanga kule ndawo. Leli fomu lizovula iklayenti lakho le-imeyili esikhundleni salokho.
proposal.form.ready: Lapho uthumela isicelo, i-IATF izokwakha irekhodi lokungeniswa.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Sicela uqedele ukuhlola ukuvikelwa kogaxekile ngaphambi kokuthumela.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Ukuvikelwa kwe-spam kuphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela uqedele ukuhlola futhi ngaphambi kokuthumela.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Ukuvikelwa kwe-spam akukwazanga ukuqinisekiswa okwamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Ukuvikelwa kwe-spam kuphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela uzame ukuhlola futhi.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Sicela ugcwalise izinkambu ezidingekayo ngaphambi kokuthumela.
proposal.form.success: Siyabonga. Isicelo sakho samukelwa futhi sagcinwa ukuze sibuyekezwe.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Uma uphinde uthintane ne-IATF mayelana nalesi sicelo, faka inkomba engezansi.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle ngenkathi uthumela isicelo. Sicela uzame futhi. Uma inkinga iqhubeka, sebenzisa i-imeyili esikhundleni salokho.
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Umthombo wesiNgisi esivamile, izinguqulo zingangezwa kamuva
footer.label: Isithasiselo sesayithi
footer.blurb: Umsebenzi wokufinyeleleka kufanele kube lula ukuqala, kube lula ukushicilela, futhi kube lula ukugcina kuvulekile.
footer.source: Izinkomba zezindinganiso zokufinyeleleka: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Umkhuba owaziwa ngabasebenzisi bezobuchwepheshe bokusiza.
contact.label: Ukuxhumana
translation.label: Isimo sokuhumusha
translation.source: IsiNgisi siwulimi lomthombo olusemthethweni lwaleli khasi.
translation.humanReviewed: Le nguqulo iye yabuyekezwa isikhulumi esiqephuzayo.
translation.machineAssisted: Lokhu kuhumusha kusizwa ngomshini futhi akukabukezwa ngokuphelele yisikhulumi esiphephile. Iziphakamiso zamukelekile ngeGitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Lokhu kuhumusha kwabuyekezwa ngaphambi kokuvuselelwa kwenguqulo yesiNgisi yakamuva futhi kungase kudinge ukuvuselelwa.
